GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [value@1 DESC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[value@1 DESC]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[ps_partkey@0 as ps_partkey, sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@1 as value]
      NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@0 AS Decimal128(38, 15)) > sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty) * Float64(0.000002)@1, projection=[ps_partkey@1, sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@2]
        GpuProjectExec: expr=[CAST(CAST(sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)@0 AS Float64) * 0.000002 AS Decimal128(38, 15)) as sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty) * Float64(0.000002)]
          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)]
            GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, s_nationkey@2)], projection=[1, 2]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=n_name@1 = GERMANY, projection=[0]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=24403223
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_nationkey@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[ps_availqty@1 as ps_availqty, ps_supplycost@2 as ps_supplycost, s_nationkey@0 as s_nationkey]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_suppkey@0, ps_suppkey@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=24403223
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ps_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=24403223
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ps_partkey], aggr=[sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ps_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ps_partkey], aggr=[sum(partsupp.ps_supplycost * partsupp.ps_availqty)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, s_nationkey@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=n_name@1 = GERMANY, projection=[0]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=24403223
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_nationkey@3], 8), input_partitions=8

                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_suppkey@0, ps_suppkey@1)], projection=[1, 2, 4, 5]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=24403223
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1

                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=24403223
--- memory ---
